name: Integrals
description: Test your knowledge of immediate integrals and area calculation.

questions.question: What is the indefinite integral of the constant function f(x) = k?
By the power rule, what is the integral of f(x) = x^n (for n ≠ -1)?
What is the integral of f(x) = 1/x for x > 0?
What is the integral of the function f(x) = sin(x)?
What is the value of the definite integral of f(x) = x over the interval [0, 2]?
What is the integral of the exponential function f(x) = e^x?
What does the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus state about the integral of f(x) on [a, b]?
What is the integral of f(x) = sec^2(x)?
What is the integral of f(x) = 1 / (1 + x^2)?
Geometrically, what does the definite integral of f(x) ≥ 0 represent?
